description_long: This is a colorful outdoor bench constructed from horizontal wooden planks painted in alternating blue, yellow, and red hues. The seat and backrest are composed of three wide wooden slats each, fastened with visible metal bolts. The bench is supported by four sturdy, rectangular metal legs with a slightly weathered finish, providing stability and durability. The paint on the wood appears slightly worn, suggesting exposure to the elements and frequent use, typical for public park or playground furniture. The backrest is upright and extends the full width of the seat, offering comfortable support for users. The overall design is simple, functional, and inviting, making it suitable for communal urban spaces.
description: A weathered, multicolored wooden bench with a metal frame and upright backrest, designed for outdoor public use. The bench features blue, yellow, and red painted slats and sturdy metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, with three colored wooden slats on both the seat and backrest, and all four metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden slats, the upright angle of the backrest, and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bench, with the colored slats and metal supports clearly visible, and the seat partially obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the profile of the bench and the arrangement of the slats and legs.
